comments.comment:
Contaminant should have been included when updates were completed in 2014 (i.e. Use of site specific methane generation rate (k), potential methane generation capacity (L0) and NMOC
Concentration in LANDGEM, U.S. EPA's Landfill Gas Emissions Model, which is used in the estimation of
LFG production rates. Lachute Landfill should also be referred to as Régie Intermunicipale Argenteuil
Deux-Montagnes.)

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Vehicle travelled kilometers on unpaved roads increased 3 times over the vehicle kilometer travelled in 2013, causing the PM emissions to greatly increase.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methane generation rate, an input in LANDGEM, doubled in 2014 relative to 2013 which results in higher volumes of methane in LFG and higher PM emissions released due to combustion.  In addition, vehicle kilometers travelled on unpaved roads increased 3 times relative to 2013, causing the PM emissions to greatly increase.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
